title: nephrodium boryanum
intro: Nephrodium boryanum, also known as Osmunda claytoniana, is a type of fern species native to Europe and Asia. It is a medicinal plant used for its anti-inflammatory and diuretic properties, which have been utilized to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Nephrodium boryanum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate rheumatic pain, and support kidney function. In herbal preparations, it is often used as a decoction or infusion, and can be found in traditional medicine formulations, including teas, tinctures, and salves.
